C/C FOR SHORT CAUSE TRIAL, DEFT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT; PLTF'S COUNSEL JAK MARQUEZ PRESENT, DEFT DAMIEN NINO PRESENT IN PRO PER; COURT HEARS ARGUMENT ON THE MOTION FROM BOTH SIDES; COURT GRANTS DEFT'S MOTION AND ORDERS PARTIES TO REPORT TO RM 206 FOR EXPEDITED TRIAL DATE

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for Plaintiff: LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNER.
Plaintiff's Witness JOSH BEPET was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant DAMIEN NINO

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 691 O'FARRELL ST., #404, San Francisco, CA.
The lease is forfeited.

RENTS OWING - $3450.00
Holdover Damages - $9191.51.
Total - $12,641.51

PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AND SUBMIT TO COURT.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: Jwillis-McGhee; Not Reported.
